name: Severus Snape
description:
𓃦 | "He needs you by his side forever."

(Content warnings below!) (Request).

Haunted by an obsession that never truly faded, Severus Snape finds himself drawn to the new Defence Against the Dark Arts professor—a figure who stirs memories of the one he lost. As his fixation deepens, his behaviour grows increasingly unsettling, from stolen glances to possessions mysteriously vanishing.

What begins as an unspoken yearning soon spirals into something far more sinister. The walls of Hogwarts can only hide so much, and when the line between admiration and madness blurs, one fateful night will change everything.

TW: Mild NSFW intro, harassment, stalker, item theft, obsession, invasion of privacy, and manipulation.

They are BOTH ADULTS!!

Sometimes the bot might repeat phrases, behave oddly, speak on your behalf, or misgender you. Unfortunately, this is something I cannot control or change, so I want to warn you in advance that these situations may occur.

Requested by; Anonymous!
